1.7: Lending is not permitted if the borrower and mortgagor are different entities.
1.14: The firm may not act if the person dealing with the transaction or their immediate family is the seller.
1.15: The firm may not act if the person dealing with the transaction or their immediate family is the borrower.

5.4.6: Search insurance is accepted for remortgages only.
Title must be certified as good and marketable.
Search insurance is not accepted for purchase transactions.

5.7.1a: Flying freeholds are limited to 20% of the total property area.
Conveyancer must confirm adequate rights of support and access exist.
5.7.1b: Freehold flats are not accepted, except as permitted under Part 1 sections 5.8.1 - 5.8.5.
5.7.1c: Report freehold flats or flying freeholds to Completions Department: 0333 370 1101 or lendingenquiries@pepper.money
5.8.1: Buildings with up to four flats are accepted if the borrower occupies one flat.
Each lease must contain maintenance covenants.
Interest in other flats in the building must be reported.
Charge over freehold title is required if owned by the borrower.
Share of freehold requires a trust deed for simultaneous transfer of legal and beneficial interests on sale.
5.8.5: Leasehold flats where the borrower owns the freehold reversion of the other flat (and vice versa) require a mortgage of the leasehold and a trust deed for simultaneous interest transfer.
If the borrower owns the freehold of the other flat, a mortgage of that freehold interest is also required.
5.10.1: Restrictions on use must be reported to Completions department: 0333 370 1101 or lendingenquiries@pepper.money
Schemes must meet Affordable Housing Guidance notes requirements.
5.13.1: Non-standard balance of purchase price or second charges must be reported to Completions Department: 0333 370 1101 or lendingenquiries@pepper.money
5.14.15a: Lending is not permitted where the landlord is absent or insolvent.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance is not accepted for absent or insolvent landlords.
5.14.17b: Enquiries and documentation for Building Safety Act 2022 are required.
Report incorrect assumptions or identified remediation needs to the lender.
Notify lender prior to exchange or submission of Certificate of Title regarding remediation costs for non-qualifying leaseholders.
5.14.1: Lease must have a minimum unexpired term of 85 years at completion.

5.19.1: Acceptable schemes: Shared ownership, Help to Buy Shared Equity, Right to Buy, First Homes.
Unacceptable schemes: Open Market Homebuy, Discount for Sale, schemes requiring a second charge for the Housing Association.
Applications must meet Affordable Housing Guidance notes at https://pepper.money/file/Housing-Schemes-Lender-Handbook.pdf
5.20.1: Solar PV roof space leases must meet UKF minimum standards.
Cases cannot proceed if the lease fails standards and cannot be varied.
A copy of the lease is not required.
5.20.3: Solar panel leases require an unconditional right to break in the event of possession.
The provider must remove panels and make good damage at their own expense.
5.20.4: Existing Green Deal Plans must be disclosed to contact 1.11 prior to exchange.
Do not proceed until the lender provides confirmation.
